name: Jay Inslee
subject: Washington will rise to the challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I want to share my vision for the future of Washington.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8235%2E868730%2E61lrcE) Friend -- Today, I'll be inaugurated for a third term as your governor. I'm so grateful for the faith Washington state has put in me and for the support this online community gave me through the past eight years. It's been an honor. But you better believe the work is just getting started. The last year alone has been particularly difficult: More than 3,500 Washingtonians have lost their lives to COVID-19, while many more are still struggling financially, emotionally, and physically to recover from this virus. We all feel the anxiety, and so much is still yet unknown. But even through this difficult time, we know one thing: Washingtonians will rise to the challenge. We are a resilient state. We know how to recover and will continue our march toward a more just and equitable community. In the last year, we've seen so much tragedy, but we've also seen so much hope: remarkable heroism from our frontline workers, generosity from friends and neighbors, and unending support and love from family members near and far. **I'm focused on rebuilding, and when we get back to normal, it must be a new normal -- a better normal. A new normal focused on ending racial injustice, supporting small business and local entrepreneurship, reimagining public health, building pathways to good jobs, expanding education opportunities, expanding access to affordable housing, and continuing our commitment to end climate change.** This new era will take all of us coming together to build something better. President Abraham Lincoln said, "The fiery trial through which we pass, will light us down, in honor or dishonor, to the latest generation." Out of the darkness of 2020 begins a new dawn, one in which we'll build an equitable and robust future for all Washingtonians. **[I shared more of my vision for the future of Washington state over on Facebook, and I'd love for you to take a look and share with your friends and family.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14099?t=4&akid=8235%2E868730%2E61lrcE)** We'll get this done, Washington. Very truly yours, Jay | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14099?t=5&akid=8235%2E868730%2E61lrcE)
---

| Dear Patriot,
The social media network Parler has been banned by the Big Tech monopolies like Amazon and Apple. If you don't know what Parler is, it is a platform for free speech that is uncensored and unbiased. While so many mainstream social media platforms have diligently worked to silence and censor Conservatives, Parler stood as an outlet for all kinds of ideas, thoughts, opinions, and expressions. This ban is EXTREMELY ALARMING. This is the rise of authoritarianism at its best. It is a concentrated effort to ensure the "free-flow" of communication and information is in line with Far-Left extremists' ideals. It is clear that even the President of the United States is not exempt from the power Big Tech has over free speech and communication. We must fight back against these monopolies. We must ensure that any platform used for communication does not stifle the voices of those who express different views. Would you be willing to chip in today so we can protect our most treasured right, the First Amendment? name: Mike Huckabee
subject: This is not going to be easy
body:
Peter,
There is a tremendous amount of frustration across this country. I know it because I feel it too.
After campaigning on promises of “unity,” leaders in the U.S. House of Representatives kicked off the new Congress by banning gendered words like mother, father, brother and sister.
Aside from being insane, this is an assault on both science and the family -- but this is the new, radical secular Left. And if you disagree, prepare to be censored by their allies in Silicon Valley.
I tell you this not to make you angry, but you need to be fully aware of what we are in for.
Those of us who believe in biblical values have had a few years of substantial victories, primarily when it comes to protecting the sanctity of life. But things are about to change in a big way.
With your help, My Faith Votes made tremendous progress in 2020\. We’ve been able to connect with millions of Christian voters and have brought thousands of new volunteers into the fold. In fact, 9 million more Christians voted in the 2020 elections.
In 2021, we will be doubling down. We will be ramping up our organizing at the state and local level, and when necessary, engaging in the large cultural battles in Washington, D.C.
And if the new “gender-neutral” rules are any indication, there will be many.
**[_As a 100% donor-funded non-profit, My Faith Votes will need your help in 2021, and I hope you’ll recommit to our efforts by making a secure donation today._](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p210114apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210114apl01nd&n=1 "Support My Faith Votes")**
In the meantime, I hope you will join me by praying for our nation and its leaders. If there were ever a time for His wisdom, it is now.
Thank you, now let’s move forward.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p210114apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210114apl01nd&n=2)
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210114apl01nd&n=3)

name: Christy Smith
subject: Tell Mike Garcia: Resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

As more and more information comes out about the attacks on the U.S. Capitol last week, it's become more clear that things were worse than we yet know. We are going to need a lengthy, thorough investigation to uncover just what happened and who in our government was coordinating with the seditionists.

Amidst my fear for those who were put in harm's way and my sadness for the degradation of our democracy, I find that I am angrier than I have ever been before.

For years, Republicans have stood by Donald Trump, staying silent time after time as he spread hateful rhetoric, passed harmful bills, and denied the validity of our elections.

And at his lowest, when he incited violence against the Capitol and our duly elected representatives, over a hundred House Republicans voted to cast doubt on the 2020 elections.

**Among those Republicans who showed cowardice and a refusal to honor their oath to this country was Mike Garcia.**

When we needed him to be a leader for CA-25, he sided with his political party over his -- _our_ \-- country. For that, we can no longer expect him to represent us. He must resign.

**[Peter, if you agree that Mike Garcia is unfit to represent CA-25 in Congress, please add your name to our petition calling on him to resign immediately.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be98/29776869/84e99c7/569d7826/760062389/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMTRfcmVzaWducmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2101_christy_garciaresign?source=em21_210114_resignresend_in")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be98/29776869/84e99c7/569d7826/760062389/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMTRfcmVzaWducmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2101_christy_garciaresign?source=em21_210114_resignresend_in") Media outlets and residents in our district have already called Mike out for neglecting his duty to his district, his country, and the Constitution:

_"Garcia stands behind objection to presidential election results" - The Signal, Santa Clarita Valley

"Editorial: McCarthy and Garcia failed to act" - Antelope Valley Press

"Op-ed: Kevin McCarthy and Mike Garcia must resign" - Antelope Valley Times_
It's clear that our community cannot trust Mike to act in the best interests of this country.

**We can't even count on him to tell the truth to Trump's base:** that allegations of election fraud were never more than a conspiracy spread by a demagogue trying to hang onto power at any cost.

Mike has shown us all exactly what he is. He's a party-loyalist. An enabler. A far-right radical.

**And he's _not_ who we need serving CA-25 in Congress.**

**[Peter, take just a moment to add your name calling on Mike Garcia to resign today. He's already done too much damage to this country -- we need to prevent him from doing any more.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be98/29776869/84e99c7/569d7826/760062389/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAxMTRfcmVzaWducmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://christysmith.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/2101_christy_garciaresign?source=em21_210114_resignresend_in")**

Thank you,

Christy

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Get your Inauguration Commemorative Button!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
On Wednesday, January 20, 2021 Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will be sworn in as President and Vice President of the United States.

I've got my priorities straight. So does the President. [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hdb4WNfzJrcqI4c&b=j54f4dLt3B4ozViii6iBvw)

**We are taking the fight to the Socialists and their establishment Republican toadies, because someone has to.[Help us fight for the Republic!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hdb4WNfzJrcqI4c&b=j54f4dLt3B4ozViii6iBvw)**

_We need your help to make the weak Republicans feel the heat- defeat them in 2022 and make examples of them!_

We want REAL America First Republican leaders. [Will you help us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hdb4WNfzJrcqI4c&b=j54f4dLt3B4ozViii6iBvw)

Your contribution is so crucial. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hdb4WNfzJrcqI4c&b=j54f4dLt3B4ozViii6iBvw)- we don't need the anti-American politicians of EITHER PARTY!

The President is fighting. We need more of him. [Help us push forward and fight for America](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hdb4WNfzJrcqI4c&b=j54f4dLt3B4ozViii6iBvw)!

Folks, when a barn is rotten the best thing is to burn it down & rebuild. We must begin a RECKONING with Domestic Enemies of our Constitution! Then we can RESTORE the Founders Original Intent & MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Last time I checked, Wyoming was All-American & flat out CONSERVATIVE! Who does Liz Cheney think she is? We need to remind her the VOTERS decide in 2022.

[Donate now.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hdb4WNfzJrcqI4c&b=j54f4dLt3B4ozViii6iBvw)
